{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/452625?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/mbarbero", "id": 452625, "login": "mbarbero", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ1MjYyNQ==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/mbarbero", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary

The kanidmd web UI renders the WebAuthn passkey-registration challenge as raw JSON inside an inline `<script id="data">` element using the Askama `|safe` filter. The challenge embeds the account's `displayname`, which `serde_json` serialises without escaping `<`/`>`. A `displayname` containing `</script>` therefore terminates the script element early and injects arbitrary HTML into the credential-update page. Because the page is htmx-driven and the server's CSP allows `'unsafe-eval'`, injected `hx-*` attributes can issue authenticated same-origin API requests with the viewer's bearer cookie.

### Impact

An authenticated attacker who is a member of `idm_people_admins` can write the `displayname` of any `Person` entry — including high-privilege persons — because `idm_acp_people_pii_manage` carries no high-privilege exclusion filter. When the targeted high-privilege user later opens **Add Passkey** on their own credential-update page (`/ui/reset`), the injected markup is swapped into the DOM and htmx fires attacker-chosen same-origin requests authenticated as the victim. This allows a helpdesk-tier operator to escalate to `idm_admins` (e.g. by POSTing themselves into the group) or otherwise act with the victim's session. The self-write path (`idm_people_self_name_write`) is self-XSS only and is not counted toward impact. Even without the htmx vector, the breakout permits `<meta http-equiv='refresh'>` open-redirect and arbitrary defacement of the credential page.

### Details

- https://github.com/kanidm/kanidm/blob/master/server/core/templates/credential_update_add_passkey_partial.html#L3 — the `|safe` sink
- https://github.com/kanidm/kanidm/blob/master/server/core/src/https/views/reset.rs#L506-L509 — `serde_json::to_string` of the challenge
- https://github.com/kanidm/kanidm/blob/master/server/lib/src/idm/credupdatesession.rs#L2453-L2460 — `displayname` flows into `start_passkey_registration`

### Affected versions

All releases shipping the htmx credential-update views", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T23:34:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-06T23:34:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/kanidm/kanidm/security/advisories/GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kanidm/kanidm/security-advisories/GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/kanidm/kanidm", "summary": "Kanidm: Stored HTML injection in "passkey-enrolment" partial via displayname → htmx-driven authenticated request forgery", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:34:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpxg-fx2g-qxj2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.9.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "kanidm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.9.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Kanidm: Stored HTML injection in "passkey-enrolment" partial via displayname → htmx-driven authenticated request forgery
